subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards God, the Creator of earth and heaven! Upon thee be the glory of God, in the beginning and the end [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه الی الله فاطر الارض و السموات علیک بهاء الله فی المبدء و المال و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
